summary.en: Place reflected and rotated polyominoes in a rectangle while minimizing occupied area.
summary.zh: 将可翻转、可旋转的多连块放入矩形中，并尽量最小化占用面积。

private_assets.asset_note: ZIP overlay containing the private official run manifest at private-benchmark/runs.json. The manifest carries the hidden Frontier-CS polyomino instances as direct stdio runs.
